name: Curtiss-Wright Corporation
content: Curtiss-Wright is an integrated global business providing highly engineered products and services to the aerospace, defense, and energy markets. The company is a strategic supplier of critical components for nuclear submarines and commercial nuclear power plants, including advanced reactor coolant pumps and control systems. Curtiss-Wright’s deep technical expertise and its long-standing relationship with the nuclear industry make it an essential player in the revitalization of the nuclear supply chain.
